subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the horizon! At this moment the Branch of the Divine Lote-Tree hath presented Himself and made mention of thee, therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الناظر الی الافق در این حین غصن سدره حاضر و ذکر شما را نمود لذا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
